parameters.name: sqlServerName
parameters.description: Logical SQL Server name that hosts the operational migration database.

parameters.name: operationalDatabaseName
parameters.description: SQL-first durable store used for manifests, work items, run state, reruns, and audit history.

parameters.name: applicationInsightsConnectionString
parameters.description: Application Insights connection string or Key Vault reference.

parameters.name: artifactStorageAccountName
parameters.description: Storage account used for ingestion/export artifacts, not operational run state.
